title: Trump's Disapproval Surges as Iran War Drags On
meta_description: NBC News poll shows Trump's approval at 37% as Iran conflict remains unpopular. Disapproval ratings climb amid ongoing peace negotiations.

The survey shows 61% of Americans disapprove of the administration's military strategy in Iran, with economic concerns and lengthy peace negotiations driving public dissatisfaction. Trump's disapproval rating has reached historic highs during his tenure as the unpopular war continues to dominate public opinion.
